metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where GuardDuty data is ingested
Name of the table where GuardDuty findings are stored (default: AWSGuardDuty)
Primary column containing raw GuardDuty JSON (default: EventData)
Fallback column when primary raw column is empty (default: Message)
Enable geo_info_from_ip_address() enrichment in the Network parser
Filter records that fail required-field validation in the Main parser
Auto-detect and unwrap EventBridge envelope format

properties.query:
[concat('let AWSGuardDuty_Config = () {
    datatable(Setting: string, Value: string, Description: string, DefaultValue: string)[
        "TableName",              "', parameters('guardDutyTableName'), '",     "Primary GuardDuty table",                   "AWSGuardDuty",
        "RawColumn",              "', parameters('rawDataColumn'), '",           "Raw JSON column",                           "EventData",
        "AlternateRawColumn",     "', parameters('alternateRawDataColumn'), '", "Fallback raw JSON column",                  "Message",
        "DefaultLookback",        "', parameters('defaultLookback'), '",        "Default query lookback",                    "7d",
        "MaxLookback",            "', parameters('maxLookback'), '",            "Maximum allowed lookback",                  "90d",
        "QueryTimeout",           "300",                                        "Query timeout in seconds",                  "300",
        "MinSeverityScore",       "0.0",                                        "Minimum severity score",                    "0.0",
        "MaxSeverityScore",       "10.0",                                       "Maximum severity score",                    "10.0",
        "RequiredFields",         "id,type,severity,accountId,region",          "Required finding fields",                   "id,type,severity,accountId,region",
        "HandleEventBridgeEnvelope", "', if(parameters('handleEventBridgeEnvelope'), 'true', 'false'), '",  "Auto-unwrap EventBridge envelope",          "true",
        "EnableGeoEnrichment",    "', if(parameters('enableGeoEnrichment'), 'true', 'false'), '",       "Enable geo IP enrichment",                  "true",
        "EnableASIMNormalization", "true",                                      "Enable ASIM normalization",                 "true",
        "EnableDataValidation",   "', if(parameters('enableDataValidation'), 'true', 'false'), '",     "Enable data validation",                    "true",
        "EnablePerformanceLogging", "false",                                    "Enable performance logging",                "false",
        "ParserVersion",          "', variables('parserVersion'), '",           "Parser package version",                    "1.2.0",
        "SchemaVersion",          "2.0",                                        "Expected GuardDuty schema version prefix",  "2.0",
        "LastUpdated",            "2026-06-21",                                 "Last update date",                          "2026-06-21"
    ]
};
AWSGuardDuty_Config')]

let AWSGuardDuty_Network = (lookback: timespan = timespan(null)) {
    let config = AWSGuardDuty_Config();
    let _enableGeoEnrichment = tobool(toscalar(config | where Setting == "EnableGeoEnrichment" | project Value));
    AWSGuardDuty_Main(lookback)
    | where ActionType == "NETWORK_CONNECTION"
        or FindingType has_any("DNS", "Network", "Backdoor", "Trojan", "DDoS", "Port", "Tor", "Cryptocurrency", "Malware")
        or FindingType contains "EC2/"
        or FindingType contains "Behavior:"
    | extend
        ConnectionDirection = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.connectionDirection),
        Protocol            = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.protocol),
        IsBlocked           = tobool(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.blocked),
        LocalPort           = toint(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.localPortDetails.port),
        LocalPortName       = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.localPortDetails.portName),
        RemoteIp            = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.ipAddressV4),
        RemoteIpV6          = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.ipAddressV6),
        RemotePort          = toint(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remotePortDetails.port),
        RemotePortName      = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remotePortDetails.portName),
        RemoteCountry       = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.country.countryName),
        RemoteCountryCode   = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.country.countryCode),
        RemoteCity          = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.city.cityName),
        RemoteOrganization  = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.organization.org),
        RemoteIsp           = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.organization.isp),
        RemoteAsn           = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.organization.asn),
        RemoteAsnOrg        = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.organization.asnOrg),
        RemoteLatitude      = todouble(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.geoLocation.lat),
        RemoteLongitude     = todouble(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.geoLocation.lon)
    | extend
        InstanceId        = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.instanceId),
        InstanceType      = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.instanceType),
        InstanceState     = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.instanceState),
        Platform          = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.platform),
        LaunchTime        = todatetime(gd.resource.instanceDetails.launchTime),
        AvailabilityZone  = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.availabilityZone),
        ImageId           = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.imageId),
        NetworkInterfaceId= tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.networkInterfaces[0].networkInterfaceId),
        VpcId             = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.networkInterfaces[0].vpcId),
        SubnetId          = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.networkInterfaces[0].subnetId),
        PrivateIp         = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.networkInterfaces[0].privateIpAddress),
        PrivateDnsName    = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.networkInterfaces[0].privateDnsName),
        PublicIp          = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.networkInterfaces[0].publicIp),
        PublicDnsName     = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.networkInterfaces[0].publicDnsName),
        SecurityGroupIds  = tostring(array_strcat(extract_all(@'"groupId":"([^"]+)"', gd.resource.instanceDetails.networkInterfaces[0].securityGroups), ","))
    | extend EnrichedGeoInfo = iff(_enableGeoEnrichment and isnotempty(RemoteIp), geo_info_from_ip_address(RemoteIp), dynamic({}))
    | extend
        EnrichedCountry   = iff(_enableGeoEnrichment, tostring(EnrichedGeoInfo.country), ""),
        EnrichedState     = iff(_enableGeoEnrichment, tostring(EnrichedGeoInfo.state), ""),
        EnrichedCity      = iff(_enableGeoEnrichment, tostring(EnrichedGeoInfo.city), ""),
        EnrichedLatitude  = iff(_enableGeoEnrichment, todouble(EnrichedGeoInfo.latitude), double(null)),
        EnrichedLongitude = iff(_enableGeoEnrichment, todouble(EnrichedGeoInfo.longitude), double(null))
    | extend TrafficDirection = case(ConnectionDirection == "INBOUND", "Inbound", ConnectionDirection == "OUTBOUND", "Outbound", "Unknown")
    | extend ThreatCategory = case(
        FindingType has "Backdoor", "Backdoor", FindingType has "Trojan", "Trojan",
        FindingType has "DDoS" or FindingType has "DenialOfService", "DDoS",
        FindingType has "Tor", "Anonymization", FindingType has "Cryptocurrency", "Cryptocurrency Mining",
        FindingType has "DNS", "DNS Abuse", FindingType has "Port", "Port Scanning", "Network Anomaly")
    | extend NetworkRiskScore =
        iff(SeverityLevel == "Critical", 40, 0) + iff(SeverityLevel == "High", 30, 0) +
        iff(SeverityLevel == "Medium", 20, 0) + iff(SeverityLevel == "Low", 10, 0) +
        iff(ThreatCategory in ("Backdoor", "Trojan"), 20, 0) +
        iff(RemoteCountry != "United States" and isnotempty(RemoteCountry), 10, 0) +
        iff(IsBlocked == false, 10, 0)
    | project TimeGenerated, EventTime, FindingId, FindingType, ThreatCategory, Severity, SeverityLevel, NetworkRiskScore, Title, Description, AwsAccountId, AwsRegion, ConnectionDirection, TrafficDirection, Protocol, IsBlocked, LocalPort, LocalPortName, RemoteIp, RemoteIpV6, RemotePort, RemotePortName, RemoteCountry, RemoteCountryCode, RemoteCity, RemoteLatitude, RemoteLongitude, EnrichedCountry, EnrichedState, EnrichedCity, EnrichedLatitude, EnrichedLongitude, RemoteOrganization, RemoteIsp, RemoteAsn, RemoteAsnOrg, InstanceId, InstanceType, InstanceState, Platform, LaunchTime, AvailabilityZone, ImageId, NetworkInterfaceId, VpcId, SubnetId, PrivateIp, PrivateDnsName, PublicIp, PublicDnsName, SecurityGroupIds, ParserVersion, RecordSource = "AWSGuardDuty_Network", RawJson
};
AWSGuardDuty_Network

// AWSGuardDuty_IAM
// Enhanced IAM-focused parser for GuardDuty findings
// Extracts API call details, identity context, and authentication information
let AWSGuardDuty_IAM = (lookback: timespan = timespan(null)) {
    AWSGuardDuty_Main(lookback)
    | where ActionType == "AWS_API_CALL" or FindingType has_any("IAM", "Stealth", "Policy", "Credential", "UnauthorizedAPI", "Persistence", "PrivilegeEscalation")
    //
    // Extract comprehensive API call details with error handling
    | extend
        ApiName = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.api),
            tostring(gd.service.action.dnsRequestAction.domain),
            "Unknown"
        ),
        ServiceName_API = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.serviceName),
            extract(@"^([^\.]+)", 1, tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.api)),
            "Unknown"
        ),
        CallerType = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.callerType),
            "Unknown"
        ),
        ErrorCode = tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.errorCode),
        UserAgent = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.userAgent),
            "Unknown"
        ),
        // Enhanced remote IP extraction with fallbacks
        RemoteIp_API = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteIpDetails.ipAddressV4),
            tostring(gd.service.remoteIpDetails.ipAddressV4),
            tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.ipAddressV4)
        ),
        RemoteCountry_API = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteIpDetails.country.countryName),
            tostring(gd.service.remoteIpDetails.country.countryName)
        ),
        RemoteCity_API = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteIpDetails.city.cityName),
            tostring(gd.service.remoteIpDetails.city.cityName)
        ),
        RemoteOrganization_API = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteIpDetails.organization.org),
            tostring(gd.service.remoteIpDetails.organization.org)
        ),
        RemoteIsp_API = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteIpDetails.organization.isp),
            tostring(gd.service.remoteIpDetails.organization.isp)
        )
    //
    // Enhanced identity context extraction
    | extend
        // Account and user information
        RemoteAccountId = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteAccountDetails.accountId),
            tostring(gd.accountId)
        ),
        UserName = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteAccountDetails.affiliated),
            tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.userName),
            extract(@"user/([^/]+)", 1, tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.principalId))
        ),
        AccessKeyId = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteAccountDetails.accessKeyId),
            tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.accessKeyId)
        ),
        PrincipalId = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteAccountDetails.principalId),
            tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.principalId)
        ),
        SessionName = tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteAccountDetails.sessionName),
        // Enhanced user type classification
        UserType = case(
            tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.userType) == "IAMUser", "IAM User",
            tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.userType) == "Root", "Root Account",
            tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.userType) == "AssumedRole", "Assumed Role",
            isnotempty(tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteAccountDetails.sessionName)), "Assumed Role",
            isnotempty(tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.accessKeyId)), "IAM User",
            "Unknown"
        )
    //
    // Enhanced resource context extraction
    | extend
        ResourceArn = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.resource.resourceArn),
            tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.accessKeyId)
        ),
        ResourceUserName = tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.userName),
        ResourceUserType = tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.userType),
        ResourceInstanceId = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.instanceId),
        ResourceInstanceType = tostring(gd.resource.instanceDetails.instanceType)
    //
    // Enhanced action result determination
    | extend ActionResult = case(
        isnotempty(ErrorCode) and ErrorCode != "Success", "Failure",
        ErrorCode == "Success", "Success",
        FindingType has "Unauthorized", "Failure",
        FindingType has "Stealth", "Success", // Stealth activities are typically successful
        isnotempty(ApiName), "Success",
        "Unknown"
    )
    //
    // Enhanced finding categorization with threat intelligence
    | extend FindingCategory = case(
        FindingType has_any("Stealth", "StealthyBehavior"), "Stealth Activity",
        FindingType has_any("Policy", "PolicyViolation"), "Policy Violation",
        FindingType has_any("Credential", "CredentialAccess"), "Credential Compromise",
        FindingType has_any("UnauthorizedAPI", "Unauthorized"), "Unauthorized Access",
        FindingType has_any("Persistence", "PersistentThreat"), "Persistence",
        FindingType has_any("PrivilegeEscalation", "Escalation"), "Privilege Escalation",
        FindingType has_any("Reconnaissance", "Recon"), "Reconnaissance",
        FindingType has_any("Discovery", "Enum"), "Discovery",
        "IAM Activity"
    ),
    // Risk scoring based on finding characteristics
    RiskScore = case(
        SeverityLevel == "High" and ActionResult == "Success", 90,
        SeverityLevel == "High" and ActionResult == "Failure", 70,
        SeverityLevel == "Medium" and ActionResult == "Success", 60,
        SeverityLevel == "Medium" and ActionResult == "Failure", 40,
        SeverityLevel == "Low", 20,
        10
    ),
    // Authentication method inference
    AuthenticationMethod = case(
        isnotempty(SessionName), "Assumed Role",
        isnotempty(AccessKeyId) and UserType == "Root Account", "Root Access Key",
        isnotempty(AccessKeyId), "Access Key",
        "Unknown"
    ),
    // Threat indicators
    ThreatIndicators = case(
        RemoteCountry_API in ("China", "Russia", "North Korea", "Iran"), "High-Risk Geography",
        RemoteOrganization_API has_any("Tor", "VPN", "Proxy"), "Anonymization Service",
        UserAgent has_any("curl", "wget", "python", "boto"), "Programmatic Access",
        ApiName has_any("CreateUser", "AttachUserPolicy", "CreateRole"), "Privilege Operations",
        ""
    )
    //
    // Data quality validation
    | extend DataQuality = case(
        isempty(FindingId), "Missing FindingId",
        isempty(ApiName) and ActionType == "AWS_API_CALL", "Missing API Name",
        isempty(RemoteIp_API) and ActionType == "AWS_API_CALL", "Missing Remote IP",
        "Good"
    )
    //
    // Filter out low-quality records if specified
    | where DataQuality == "Good" or isempty(DataQuality)
    //
    // Project comprehensive IAM-specific fields
    | project 
        TimeGenerated,
        EventTime,
        FindingId,
        FindingType,
        FindingCategory,
        Severity,
        SeverityLevel,
        RiskScore,
        Title,
        Description,
        AwsAccountId,
        AwsRegion,
        // API call details
        ApiName,
        ServiceName_API,
        CallerType,
        ActionResult,
        ErrorCode,
        UserAgent,
        // Enhanced identity context
        RemoteAccountId,
        UserName,
        UserType,
        AccessKeyId,
        PrincipalId,
        SessionName,
        AuthenticationMethod,
        // Resource context
        ResourceArn,
        ResourceUserName,
        ResourceUserType,
        ResourceInstanceId,
        ResourceInstanceType,
        // Network context
        RemoteIp_API,
        RemoteCountry_API,
        RemoteCity_API,
        RemoteOrganization_API,
        RemoteIsp_API,
        // Threat intelligence
        ThreatIndicators,
        DataQuality,
        RawJson
};
AWSGuardDuty_IAM

// AWSGuardDuty_S3
// S3-focused parser for GuardDuty findings.
// Covers Policy:S3/*, Stealth:S3/*, Discovery:S3/*, Impact:S3/*, Exfiltration:S3/* finding types.
// Extracts bucket configuration, public access posture, encryption details, and the IAM caller context.
let AWSGuardDuty_S3 = (lookback: timespan = timespan(null)) {
    AWSGuardDuty_Main(lookback)
    | where ResourceType == "S3Bucket"
        or FindingType has "S3/"
        or FindingType has_any("Policy:S3", "Stealth:S3", "Discovery:S3", "Impact:S3", "Exfiltration:S3",
                               "PenTest:S3", "Backdoor:S3", "Trojan:S3")
    // S3 bucket details (first bucket in the list — findings typically affect one bucket)
    | extend _bucket = gd.resource.s3BucketDetails[0]
    | extend
        BucketName       = tostring(_bucket.name),
        BucketArn        = tostring(_bucket.arn),
        BucketType       = tostring(_bucket.type),           // e.g. "Destination"
        BucketCreatedAt  = todatetime(_bucket.createdAt),
        BucketOwnerId    = tostring(_bucket.owner.id),
        BucketTags       = _bucket.tags
    // Encryption configuration
    | extend
        EncryptionType   = tostring(_bucket.defaultServerSideEncryption.encryptionType),
        KmsKeyArn        = tostring(_bucket.defaultServerSideEncryption.kmsMasterKeyArn)
    // Bucket-level public access block
    | extend _bpa = _bucket.publicAccess.permissionConfiguration.bucketLevelPermissions.blockPublicAccess
    | extend
        BlockPublicAcls      = tobool(_bpa.blockPublicAcls),
        IgnorePublicAcls     = tobool(_bpa.ignorePublicAcls),
        BlockPublicPolicy    = tobool(_bpa.blockPublicPolicy),
        RestrictPublicBuckets= tobool(_bpa.restrictPublicBuckets)
    // Account-level public access block
    | extend _apa = _bucket.publicAccess.permissionConfiguration.accountLevelPermissions.blockPublicAccess
    | extend
        AccountBlockPublicAcls      = tobool(_apa.blockPublicAcls),
        AccountIgnorePublicAcls     = tobool(_apa.ignorePublicAcls),
        AccountBlockPublicPolicy    = tobool(_apa.blockPublicPolicy),
        AccountRestrictPublicBuckets= tobool(_apa.restrictPublicBuckets)
    // ACL-level public access flags (bucket level)
    | extend _acl = _bucket.publicAccess.permissionConfiguration.bucketLevelPermissions.accessControlList
    | extend
        AclAllowsPublicRead  = tobool(_acl.allowsPublicReadAccess),
        AclAllowsPublicWrite = tobool(_acl.allowsPublicWriteAccess)
    // Bucket policy public access flags
    | extend _policy = _bucket.publicAccess.permissionConfiguration.bucketLevelPermissions.bucketPolicy
    | extend
        PolicyAllowsPublicRead  = tobool(_policy.allowsPublicReadAccess),
        PolicyAllowsPublicWrite = tobool(_policy.allowsPublicWriteAccess)
    // Effective permission (NOT_PUBLIC / PUBLIC)
    | extend EffectivePermission = tostring(_bucket.publicAccess.effectivePermission)
    // IAM caller context when the finding has an access key (e.g. API-driven S3 access)
    | extend
        CallerUserName    = tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.userName),
        CallerUserType    = tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.userType),
        CallerAccessKeyId = tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.accessKeyId),
        CallerPrincipalId = tostring(gd.resource.accessKeyDetails.principalId)
    // Remote IP when available (e.g. Discovery or Exfiltration findings)
    | extend
        RemoteIp      = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteIpDetails.ipAddressV4),
            tostring(gd.service.remoteIpDetails.ipAddressV4)
        ),
        RemoteCountry = coalesce(
            tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.remoteIpDetails.country.countryName),
            tostring(gd.service.remoteIpDetails.country.countryName)
        ),
        ApiName       = tostring(gd.service.action.awsApiCallAction.api)
    // S3 risk categorisation
    | extend S3RiskCategory = case(
        FindingType has_any("BucketPublicAccessGranted", "BucketBlockPublicAccessDisabled"),   "Public Exposure",
        FindingType has "BucketEncryptionDisabled",                                             "Encryption Disabled",
        FindingType has "ServerAccessLoggingDisabled",                                          "Audit Log Disabled",
        FindingType has "Discovery",                                                            "Reconnaissance",
        FindingType has "Exfiltration",                                                         "Data Exfiltration",
        FindingType has "Impact",                                                               "Data Impact",
        FindingType has "PenTest",                                                              "Penetration Testing",
        "S3 Anomaly"
    )
    // Exposure severity modifier: mark exposed buckets clearly
    | extend IsPubliclyExposed = EffectivePermission == "PUBLIC"
        or AclAllowsPublicRead == true
        or AclAllowsPublicWrite == true
        or PolicyAllowsPublicRead == true
        or PolicyAllowsPublicWrite == true
    // Risk score
    | extend S3RiskScore =
        iff(SeverityLevel == "Critical", 40, 0) +
        iff(SeverityLevel == "High",     30, 0) +
        iff(SeverityLevel == "Medium",   20, 0) +
        iff(SeverityLevel == "Low",      10, 0) +
        iff(IsPubliclyExposed,           30, 0) +
        iff(EncryptionType == "NONE" or isempty(EncryptionType), 20, 0) +
        iff(S3RiskCategory == "Data Exfiltration", 10, 0)
    | project-away _bucket, _bpa, _apa, _acl, _policy
    | project
        // Core identifiers
        TimeGenerated,
        EventTime,
        FindingId,
        FindingType,
        S3RiskCategory,
        Severity,
        SeverityLevel,
        S3RiskScore,
        Title,
        Description,
        AwsAccountId,
        AwsRegion,
        // Bucket identity
        BucketName,
        BucketArn,
        BucketType,
        BucketCreatedAt,
        BucketOwnerId,
        // Encryption
        EncryptionType,
        KmsKeyArn,
        // Public access configuration
        IsPubliclyExposed,
        EffectivePermission,
        BlockPublicAcls,
        IgnorePublicAcls,
        BlockPublicPolicy,
        RestrictPublicBuckets,
        AccountBlockPublicAcls,
        AccountIgnorePublicAcls,
        AccountBlockPublicPolicy,
        AccountRestrictPublicBuckets,
        AclAllowsPublicRead,
        AclAllowsPublicWrite,
        PolicyAllowsPublicRead,
        PolicyAllowsPublicWrite,
        // IAM caller context
        CallerUserName,
        CallerUserType,
        CallerAccessKeyId,
        CallerPrincipalId,
        ApiName,
        // Network context
        RemoteIp,
        RemoteCountry,
        // Metadata
        ParserVersion,
        RecordSource = "AWSGuardDuty_S3",
        RawJson
};
AWSGuardDuty_S3

// AWSGuardDuty_EKS
// EKS/Kubernetes-focused parser for GuardDuty findings.
// Covers EKS audit log detections (*:Kubernetes/*) and EKS runtime detections (*:Runtime/*).
// Extracts Kubernetes API call details, user context, pod/namespace context, and process information.
let AWSGuardDuty_EKS = (lookback: timespan = timespan(null)) {
    AWSGuardDuty_Main(lookback)
    | where FindingType has "Kubernetes/"
        or FindingType has "Runtime/"
        or ResourceType in ("EKSCluster", "Container")
        or FindingType has_any(
            "CredentialAccess:Kubernetes", "DefenseEvasion:Kubernetes", "Discovery:Kubernetes",
            "Execution:Kubernetes", "Impact:Kubernetes", "Persistence:Kubernetes",
            "PrivilegeEscalation:Kubernetes", "Collection:Kubernetes",
            "CredentialAccess:Runtime", "DefenseEvasion:Runtime", "Discovery:Runtime",
            "Execution:Runtime", "Impact:Runtime", "Persistence:Runtime",
            "PrivilegeEscalation:Runtime", "Exfiltration:Runtime"
        )
    // EKS cluster details
    | extend
        ClusterName = tostring(gd.resource.eksClusterDetails.name),
        ClusterArn  = tostring(gd.resource.eksClusterDetails.arn),
        ClusterStatus = tostring(gd.resource.eksClusterDetails.status),
        ClusterCreatedAt = todatetime(gd.resource.eksClusterDetails.createdAt),
        ClusterTags = gd.resource.eksClusterDetails.tags
    // Kubernetes audit log action details
    | extend _k8s = gd.service.action.kubernetesApiCallAction
    | extend
        K8sApiName          = tostring(_k8s.requestUri),
        K8sApiVerb          = tostring(_k8s.verb),
        K8sSourceIp         = tostring(_k8s.sourceIPs[0]),
        K8sUserAgent        = tostring(_k8s.userAgent),
        K8sStatusCode       = toint(_k8s.statusCode),
        K8sIsAdminCall      = tobool(tostring(_k8s.parameters) contains "admin")
    // Kubernetes user context from additionalInfo
    | extend
        K8sUserName    = tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesUserName),
        K8sUserGroups  = tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesUserGroups),
        K8sUserType    = case(
            tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesUserName) startswith "system:serviceaccount:", "ServiceAccount",
            tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesUserName) startswith "system:", "System",
            isnotempty(tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesUserName)), "User",
            "Unknown"
        )
    // Kubernetes workload context (namespace, object kind/name)
    | extend
        K8sNamespace   = tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesWorkloadDetails.namespace),
        K8sObjectKind  = tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesWorkloadDetails.type),
        K8sObjectName  = tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesWorkloadDetails.name),
        K8sContainerImage = tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesWorkloadDetails.containers[0].image),
        K8sContainerName  = tostring(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesWorkloadDetails.containers[0].name),
        K8sIsPrivileged   = tobool(gd.service.additionalInfo.kubernetesWorkloadDetails.containers[0].securityContext.privileged)
    // Runtime process context (EKS Runtime Monitoring findings)
    | extend _rt = gd.service.runtimeDetails
    | extend
        RuntimeProcess     = tostring(_rt.process.name),
        RuntimeProcessPath = tostring(_rt.process.executablePath),
        RuntimeProcessPid  = toint(_rt.process.pid),
        RuntimeProcessUser = tostring(_rt.process.user),
        RuntimeProcessArgs = tostring(_rt.process.executableSha256),
        RuntimeContext     = tostring(_rt.context.commandLineExample),
        RuntimeFilePath    = tostring(_rt.context.targetProcess.executablePath)
    // Network context for Kubernetes API calls
    | extend
        K8sRemoteIp      = tostring(gd.service.action.kubernetesApiCallAction.sourceIPs[0]),
        K8sRemoteCountry = tostring(gd.service.action.networkConnectionAction.remoteIpDetails.country.countryName)
    // Threat categorisation for EKS findings
    | extend K8sThreatCategory = case(
        FindingType has "PrivilegeEscalation",   "Privilege Escalation",
        FindingType has "CredentialAccess",       "Credential Access",
        FindingType has "Persistence",            "Persistence",
        FindingType has "DefenseEvasion",         "Defense Evasion",
        FindingType has "Discovery",              "Discovery",
        FindingType has "Execution",              "Execution",
        FindingType has "Impact",                 "Impact",
        FindingType has "Exfiltration",           "Exfiltration",
        FindingType has "Collection",             "Collection",
        "Kubernetes Anomaly"
    )
    // Risk scoring
    | extend K8sRiskScore =
        iff(SeverityLevel == "Critical",    40, 0) +
        iff(SeverityLevel == "High",        30, 0) +
        iff(SeverityLevel == "Medium",      20, 0) +
        iff(SeverityLevel == "Low",         10, 0) +
        iff(K8sIsPrivileged == true,        20, 0) +
        iff(K8sThreatCategory in ("Privilege Escalation", "Credential Access"), 15, 0) +
        iff(K8sUserType == "ServiceAccount" and K8sThreatCategory != "Discovery", 10, 0)
    | project-away _k8s, _rt
    | project
        // Core identifiers
        TimeGenerated,
        EventTime,
        FindingId,
        FindingType,
        K8sThreatCategory,
        Severity,
        SeverityLevel,
        K8sRiskScore,
        Title,
        Description,
        AwsAccountId,
        AwsRegion,
        // EKS cluster context
        ClusterName,
        ClusterArn,
        ClusterStatus,
        ClusterCreatedAt,
        // Kubernetes API call details
        K8sApiName,
        K8sApiVerb,
        K8sStatusCode,
        K8sSourceIp,
        K8sUserAgent,
        K8sIsAdminCall,
        // Kubernetes identity
        K8sUserName,
        K8sUserType,
        K8sUserGroups,
        // Kubernetes workload context
        K8sNamespace,
        K8sObjectKind,
        K8sObjectName,
        K8sContainerImage,
        K8sContainerName,
        K8sIsPrivileged,
        // Runtime process context (Runtime Monitoring findings)
        RuntimeProcess,
        RuntimeProcessPath,
        RuntimeProcessPid,
        RuntimeProcessUser,
        RuntimeProcessArgs,
        RuntimeContext,
        RuntimeFilePath,
        // Network context
        K8sRemoteIp,
        K8sRemoteCountry,
        // Metadata
        ParserVersion,
        RecordSource = "AWSGuardDuty_EKS",
        RawJson
};
AWSGuardDuty_EKS

// AWSGuardDuty_ASIMNetworkSession
// Maps GuardDuty network findings to ASIM Network Session schema v0.2.6.
// All column references are sourced from AWSGuardDuty_Network() output schema only.
let AWSGuardDuty_ASIMNetworkSession = (lookback: timespan = timespan(null)) {
    AWSGuardDuty_Network(lookback)
    | where isnotempty(RemoteIp)
    // ASIM Network Session schema fields (v0.2.6)
    | extend
        // Standard event metadata
        EventType              = "NetworkSession",
        EventSchemaVersion     = "0.2.6",
        EventVendor            = "AWS",
        EventProduct           = "GuardDuty",
        EventProductVersion    = "1.0",
        EventCount             = int(1),
        EventStartTime         = EventTime,
        EventEndTime           = EventTime,
        EventResult            = "Success",      // GuardDuty detects allowed connections
        EventSeverity          = SeverityLevel,
        EventOriginalSeverity  = tostring(Severity),
        EventMessage           = Title,
        EventOriginalType      = FindingType,
        EventOriginalUid       = FindingId,
        EventUid               = strcat("guardduty-", FindingId),
        // Source fields (AWS resource side)
        SrcIpAddr    = coalesce(PrivateIp, PublicIp, ""),
        SrcPortNumber = LocalPort,
        SrcHostname  = coalesce(InstanceId, ""),
        SrcDvcId     = coalesce(InstanceId, ""),
        SrcDvcIdType = iff(isnotempty(InstanceId), "Other", ""),
        SrcGeoCountry = AwsRegion,
        SrcGeoRegion  = AwsRegion,
        SrcDomain     = coalesce(VpcId, ""),
        SrcDomainType = iff(isnotempty(VpcId), "Other", ""),
        // Destination fields (remote endpoint)
        DstIpAddr     = RemoteIp,
        DstPortNumber = RemotePort,
        DstGeoCountry = coalesce(RemoteCountry, ""),
        DstGeoCity    = coalesce(RemoteCity, ""),
        DstGeoRegion  = coalesce(RemoteCountry, ""),
        DstHostname   = coalesce(PublicDnsName, ""),
        // Network fields
        NetworkProtocol = case(
            Protocol == "TCP",  "TCP",
            Protocol == "UDP",  "UDP",
            Protocol == "ICMP", "ICMP",
            toupper(Protocol)
        ),
        NetworkDirection  = TrafficDirection,
        NetworkSessionId  = FindingId,
        NetworkBytes      = int(0),    // GuardDuty does not provide byte counts
        NetworkPackets    = int(0),    // GuardDuty does not provide packet counts
        NetworkApplicationProtocol = case(
            RemotePort == 80,   "HTTP",
            RemotePort == 443,  "HTTPS",
            RemotePort == 53,   "DNS",
            RemotePort == 22,   "SSH",
            RemotePort == 3389, "RDP",
            RemotePort == 25,   "SMTP",
            RemotePort == 21,   "FTP",
            ""
        ),
        // Device fields (the EC2 instance or resource that triggered the finding)
        DvcId        = coalesce(InstanceId, ""),
        DvcIdType    = iff(isnotempty(InstanceId), "Other", ""),
        DvcHostname  = coalesce(InstanceId, ""),
        DvcOs        = case(
            Platform == "windows", "Windows",
            Platform == "linux",   "Linux",
            isnotempty(Platform),  Platform,
            "Linux"
        ),
        DvcOsVersion = "",
        DvcAction    = "Allow",
        DvcInterface = coalesce(NetworkInterfaceId, ""),
        // Threat fields
        ThreatName               = FindingType,
        ThreatRiskLevel          = case(
            SeverityLevel == "Critical",      95,
            SeverityLevel == "High",          80,
            SeverityLevel == "Medium",        50,
            SeverityLevel == "Low",           20,
            SeverityLevel == "Informational", 10,
            toint(Severity * 10)
        ),
        ThreatOriginalRiskLevel  = tostring(Severity),
        ThreatField              = iff(isnotempty(RemoteIp), "DstIpAddr", ""),
        ThreatIpAddr             = RemoteIp,
        ThreatIsActive           = true,
        ThreatFirstReportedTime  = EventTime,
        ThreatLastReportedTime   = EventTime,
        // Rule fields
        RuleName   = FindingType,
        RuleNumber = int(0),
        RuleAction = "Alert",
        // AWS-specific context packed for ASIM AdditionalFields
        AdditionalFields = bag_pack(
            "AwsAccountId",      AwsAccountId,
            "AwsRegion",         AwsRegion,
            "VpcId",             VpcId,
            "SubnetId",          SubnetId,
            "InstanceId",        InstanceId,
            "InstanceType",      InstanceType,
            "SecurityGroupIds",  SecurityGroupIds,
            "NetworkInterfaceId",NetworkInterfaceId,
            "RemoteOrganization",RemoteOrganization,
            "RemoteIsp",         RemoteIsp,
            "RemoteAsn",         RemoteAsn,
            "GuardDutyFindingId",FindingId,
            "Platform",          Platform,
            "ImageId",           ImageId,
            "LaunchTime",        LaunchTime
        )
    // ASIM compliance check — must have both IP addresses and a protocol
    | extend ASIMCompliance = case(
        isempty(SrcIpAddr) and isempty(DstIpAddr), "Missing IP addresses",
        isempty(NetworkProtocol),                  "Missing protocol",
        isempty(tostring(EventTime)),              "Missing timestamp",
        "Compliant"
    )
    | where ASIMCompliance == "Compliant"
    | project
        // ASIM event metadata
        TimeGenerated,
        EventType,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventVendor,
        EventProduct,
        EventProductVersion,
        EventCount,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventResult,
        EventSeverity,
        EventOriginalSeverity,
        EventMessage,
        EventOriginalType,
        EventOriginalUid,
        EventUid,
        // Source
        SrcIpAddr,
        SrcPortNumber,
        SrcHostname,
        SrcDvcId,
        SrcDvcIdType,
        SrcGeoCountry,
        SrcGeoRegion,
        SrcDomain,
        SrcDomainType,
        // Destination
        DstIpAddr,
        DstPortNumber,
        DstGeoCountry,
        DstGeoCity,
        DstGeoRegion,
        DstHostname,
        // Network
        NetworkProtocol,
        NetworkDirection,
        NetworkSessionId,
        NetworkBytes,
        NetworkPackets,
        NetworkApplicationProtocol,
        // Device
        DvcId,
        DvcIdType,
        DvcHostname,
        DvcOs,
        DvcOsVersion,
        DvcAction,
        DvcInterface,
        // Threat
        ThreatName,
        ThreatCategory,
        ThreatRiskLevel,
        ThreatOriginalRiskLevel,
        ThreatField,
        ThreatIpAddr,
        ThreatIsActive,
        ThreatFirstReportedTime,
        ThreatLastReportedTime,
        // Rule
        RuleName,
        RuleNumber,
        RuleAction,
        // Additional context
        AdditionalFields,
        ASIMCompliance,
        RawJson
};
AWSGuardDuty_ASIMNetworkSession
